---

## Problem

What limitation or workflow problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest useful version of the feature.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider, including solving it in a fork?

## Additional Context

Mockups, examples, and constraints are helpful.
